opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My stomach is burning with an agonizing pain that shoots into my back, and at the same time, my left kidney feels like it is being stabbed. My prescription stomach tablets aren't touching it.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain has escalated badly over the last two days and the maximum-dose stomach tablets are doing nothing; the kidney pain has come back on top of it and I can't get comfortable.

symptom_narrative.onset: the stomach pain has been building for months but escalated severely over the past 48 hours; the left flank pain came on more recently
symptom_narrative.duration: about 48 hours of severe escalation on a background of months of trouble
symptom_narrative.character: a burning, gnawing pain in the upper belly that shoots through to the back, and a separate stabbing, cramping pain in the left loin that shoots down to the groin
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst it has ever been — I am pacing and can't sit still
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: upper middle belly going through to the back, and the left side/loin going down towards the groin
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the stomach pain is constant and unrelenting; the flank pain comes in stabbing waves
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing — even maximum-dose esomeprazole and antacids do not help
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: movement makes the flank pain worse; nothing settles the stomach pain
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: months of watery diarrhoea and losing weight without trying; recently some bad episodic headaches with heavy sweating
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: long-running stomach ulcer trouble that never fully settles despite strong acid tablets, and previous kidney stones
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: cannot rest or find any comfortable position; lives alone and is frightened by how severe it is

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long-standing stomach ulcers that never properly heal even on strong prescription acid tablets

past_medical_history.how_managed: pain relief with ibuprofen during attacks

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: over-the-counter, taken intermittently for the kidney-stone pain

family_history_as_reported.narrative: My father died from a burst/ruptured stomach ulcer.
A sibling of mine was recently diagnosed with a tumour in the brain/pituitary gland.
Tumours in the hormone glands seem to run in my family across several generations.

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; currently in severe distress and worried about coping on their own

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported weight, not measured this encounter

objective_data_offered.value: sweaty/clammy and flushed on camera, stooped over and unable to stay still
small painless lumps on my lips and on the tip of my tongue
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient self-inspection only; not a professional oral examination
